mapper.select: SELECT img_path FROM s_posts WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id, posts_type, title, description, content, category_id, price, cover_path, img_path, browse_num, collect_num, like_num, comment_num, status, deleted, create_time, update_time FROM s_posts WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE s_posts SET like_num = #{likeNum} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count, date from (SELECT count(id) as count, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, create_time FROM s_posts where DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') between #{lastTime} and #{nowTime} GROUP BY create_time) AS s_post ORDER BY s_post.create_time ASC
